name: Zoom Phone API
what_it_does: Zoom Phone REST API for cloud business phone system. Enables AI agents to query call records, manage users and phone numbers, retrieve call recordings, access voicemails, and integrate phone system data into workflows. Part of the broader Zoom platform with unified APIs.
use_cases: Querying call history and duration data from business analytics agents
Retrieving call recordings and voicemails from operational workflow agents
Managing phone number assignments and user provisioning from IT automation agents
Integrating phone system usage data into workforce analytics agents
best_when: A business already using Zoom Phone wants AI agents to query call data, manage phone provisioning, and integrate telephony analytics into HR or operations workflows.
avoid_when: You only need Zoom video meetings — Zoom Phone is a separate product. PRIVACY: Call recordings and voicemails contain sensitive conversation content.

auth.notes: Zoom OAuth 2.0 with server-to-server OAuth for service accounts. Scopes control Phone API access. App registration on Zoom Marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Zoom Phone requires paid add-on to Zoom subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Zoom Phone plans: Metered, Unlimited US/CA, Pro Global Select
pricing.notes: Zoom Phone is a paid add-on. API access included with Zoom Phone subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Zoom API: 100 requests/second per account; dashboard-based monitoring

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Call recordings and voicemails contain sensitive conversation content
No public MCP server — server-to-server OAuth REST API integration required
Zoom Phone is a separate API from Zoom Meetings — different scopes required
Call recording retrieval requires download URL + separate download step (time-limited)
Rate limit is per account (not per app) — shared limits across all integrations
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Call recordings, voicemails, and business communication data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 with scopes. Enterprise data residency options.

security_score_components.security_notes: Business phone data including call recordings and voicemails. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2 scopes.
